view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied as evidenced by the booking details.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied as evidenced by the booking details.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step to validate the requirement of 'Fixed-duration appointments (e.g., 50 minutes)' is supported by the evidence from the 'customer-book-primary' step, which shows a confirmed booking with a specified duration. The linked use case explicitly states that clients see available 50-minute slots, confirming that the system supports fixed-duration appointments. Additionally, the booking details include timestamps that align with the expected duration, further validating that the requirement is met.
